zh.Saint Mary The Virgin Priory Churchyard,: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿斯頓聖 馬也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton於大約1299年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir Gilbert Aton 1st Baron Aton12歲，母親Alice De Aton6歲。他與Isabel Percy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1389年3月之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿斯頓聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.Saint Mary The Virgin Priory Churchyard,: 英国英格兰賀特福爾阿斯頓聖 馬也斯 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton于大约1299年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Gilbert Aton 1st Baron Aton12岁，母亲Alice De Aton6岁。他与Isabel Percy结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1389年3月之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾阿斯頓聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Aton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Hatton , with loss of initial H-.
topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)).

variants.name: Hatton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Hatton (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Warwickshire), Hatton Hall (Cheshire), or Cold and High Hatton (Shropshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Heath .
English: variant of Atton with prosthetic H-, a topographic name from Middle English atte toun ‘(dweller) at the settlement’ (Old English æt thǣm tūn(e)). Compare Towne .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chatáin, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of (Saint) Catan’; see McHatton .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton was born about 1299, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Gilbert Aton 1st Baron Aton, was 12 and his mother, Alice De Aton, was 6. He married Isabel Percy. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died before March 1389, in his hometown, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Aston, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton est né environ 1299, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilbert Aton 1st Baron Aton, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Alice De Aton, avait 6 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Percy. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant mars 1389, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Aston, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat Isabel Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor März 1389 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mary's Church, Aston, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Isabel Percy. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì prima del marzo 1389, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Aston, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Atonが約1299年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert Aton 1st Baron Atonは12歳，母Alice De Atonは6歳であった。Isabel Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1389年3月以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアストンスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary The Virgin Priory Churchyard,: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 애스턴 스트 마이'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton(이)가 대략 1299년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Gilbert Aton 1st Baron Aton(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De Aton(은)는 6세였다. 그는 Isabel Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1389년 3월 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 애스턴 스트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Aton 2nd Baron Aton родился около 1299 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Gilbert Aton 1st Baron Aton было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Aton, 6. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Percy. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер перед марта 1389 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, астон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
